comics.title: good news!  eventually!  possibly.  ...maybe
comics.alt: bye, gareth 2000!  you'll live forever on in our memories, however brief though they may be

comics.title: however i am the undisputed global expert on what it's like being me, uncontested though that field may be
comics.alt: i'm so DISTRESSED at being NOT THE BEST / though my accidental rhymes still pass the TEST

comics.title: it's always good to make new friends!
comics.alt: i've made a new friend: they're venomous but seriously there's only a teeny tiny amount of neurotoxin in their bites, so little we didn't even know it was there until recently and YES probably i should lead with other fun facts when introducing my friend the garter snake rather than leading with

comics.title: uncontacted peoples comix!  part two of two
comics.alt: confirming what i said decades ago: I have less than zero interest in knowing these sorts of things.  but, i DO have a marked interest in keeping track of what i said decades ago so that i might continually confirm them.

comics.title: you bet i followed corporate linguistic guidance and included that dash in jell-o!!!  i love to follow corporate linguistic guidance but ONLY when i am doing a BIT
comics.alt: this comic is brought to you by uncontacted peoples.  they're allowed to contact YOU but you can't say anything back to THEM; i don't make the rules i just enforce them

comics.title: death comes to us all, but before it does, LET'S READ SOME COMICS!!
comics.alt: most art was created by the dead, but then again, so were most mistakes

comics.title: god: if you want me to leave this building, just send me a sign
comics.alt: IN MY DEFENSE, the last minute has been really educational for me vis-a-vis why i'm bad at this

comics.title: several parts of his biography here are fabrications, but they're impossible to fully disprove, which makes them the SUPER FUN kind of made-up biography part
the meaning of life AND/OR math
comics.alt: we're still inventing new shapes!!  babies keep having to learn new shapes, and in this case WE'RE BABIES!!
